## Summary

Describe the purpose and technical approach of this change.

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm check` was executed locally.
- [ ] Tests were added or the absence of applicable tests is justified.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when necessary.
- [ ] No domain, schema, migration, authentication or ERP screen was introduced outside the approved scope.

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits.
- [ ] No secrets, real personal data or generated artifacts were added.
- [ ] The change is small, reviewed and scoped to one delivery.
